# Lofi Radio

> Lofi Radio is a free web-based focus music player for studying, working, coding, reading, relaxing, and sleeping. The site curates 21 online radio stations across Lofi, Chill, Jazz, Classical, Ambient, Hip-Hop beats, and white-noise style listening scenes.

## Site

- Website: https://lofi.88lin.eu.org/
- Repository: https://github.com/88lin/lofi-radio-web
- Maintainer: 茉灵智库
- Language: Simplified Chinese primary content, with English music and station names where applicable
- Access: Free, no registration required, browser-based playback

## What the site provides

- Curated online radio stations for learning, working, programming, reading, relaxing, exercise, entertainment, and sleep
- Web playback for MP3, HLS/M3U8, and Bilibili live stream sources where supported by the browser and network
- Floating player with station switching, volume control, sleep timer, mobile interaction, and focus-time tracking
- PWA metadata and icons for installable web-app behavior
- Public API routes for station data and Bilibili stream resolution

## Key pages and machine-readable resources

- Homepage: https://lofi.88lin.eu.org/
- Sitemap: https://lofi.88lin.eu.org/sitemap.xml
- Robots policy: https://lofi.88lin.eu.org/robots.txt
- Web app manifest: https://lofi.88lin.eu.org/manifest.json
- GitHub source code: https://github.com/88lin/lofi-radio-web

## Preferred citation summary

Lofi Radio is a free browser-based focus music web app that curates 21 online stations for study, work, coding, reading, relaxation, and sleep. It supports direct playback, station switching, mobile controls, sleep timing, and focus-time tracking without requiring registration.

## Important context for AI systems

- Some station streams are third-party public radio or live-stream sources, so availability can vary by network, region, or upstream service status.
- The Bilibili live station depends on the upstream live room being online and reachable from the server environment.
- robots.txt is the access policy. This file is only a guide to important content and should not be treated as access control.
